strings.app.name: Tababarka Shatiga Wadista ee Maraykanka
strings.app.tagline: Ku gudub imtixaanka shatiga wadista ee Maraykanka — bilaash, luqaddaada
strings.quiz.whyWrong: Sababta jawaabtan ay u qaldan tahay
strings.study.resume: Ka sii wad meeshii aad joojisay
strings.gallery.unnamed: Calaamad MUTCD rasmi ah — magacyada waa la sii darayaa
strings.review.entry: Dib u eeg su'aalihii aad seegtay
strings.review.tryAgainLater: Weli maaha — su'aashan way soo noqon doontaa
strings.review.doneBody: Waxaad dib u eegtay dhammaan {count} su'aalood. Shaqo fiican!
strings.review.emptyBody: Baro ama qaado imtixaan tababar — su'aalaha aad seegtay halkan ayay ka soo muuqan doonaan dib-u-eegis.
strings.flash.tapToFlip: Taabo kaarka si aad u aragto jawaabta
strings.flash.emptyBody: Kaararka calaamadaha ee gobolkan llooma helin.
strings.test.rules: {total} su'aalood: {signs} calaamadood waddo + {rules} sharci. Waa inaad hesho {minCorrect}/{sectionCount} qaybkasta si aad u gudubto.
strings.test.rules.overall: {total} su'aalood: {signs} calaamadood waddo + {rules} sharci. Waa inaad hesho {minCorrect}/{total} guud ahaan si aad u gudubto.
strings.test.result.needed: {min} sax ah ayaa loo baahan yahay in la gudbo
strings.test.timedOption: Waqti-cabbir (ikhtiyaari — imtixaanka dhabta ah wakhti xad ma leh)
strings.test.result.review: Dib u eeg su'aalihii aad seegtay
strings.history.title: Taariikhdaada
strings.history.empty: Weli taariikh ma jirto. Baro ama qaado imtixaan tababar — horumarkaaga halkan ayuu ka soo muuqan doonaa.
strings.history.activity: Dhaqdhaqaaq (30-kii maalmood ee la soo dhaafay)
strings.history.activityHint: Bareed kastaa waa maalin; mid sarreeya macnaheedu waa su'aalo badan, midabku wuxuu tusayaa saxnaanta.
strings.history.trendHint: Bareed kastaa wuxuu daboolayaa 20 jawaab, ka bilaabmaya kii ugu duugganaa ilaa kii ugu cusub.
strings.history.needMore: Ka jawaab su'aalo dheeraad ah si aad u aragto meelahaaga daciifka ah.
strings.history.testsSummary: {taken} la qaaday · {passed} la gudbay · ugu wanaagsan {best}
strings.backup.title: Kaydin & soo celin
strings.backup.subtitle: Ku kaydi dhammaan horumarkaaga iyo dejintaada fayl, ama ka soo celi mid. Akoon looma baahna.
strings.backup.exported: Nuqul waa la soo dejiyay ({count} jawaab).
strings.backup.imported: {count} jawaab cusub ayaa la soo celiyay. Dib ayaa loo rarayaa…
strings.backup.invalid: Faylkaas ma aha nuqul sax ah.
strings.progress.noTests: Weli imtixaano tababar ma jiraan — tijaabi tab-ka Imtixaanka!
strings.progress.noData: Weli xog ma jirto — bilow barashada si aad u aragto horumarka!
strings.progress.almostReady: Ku dhawaad diyaar — dib u eeg meelahaaga daciifka ah
strings.settings.title: Dejinta
strings.language.title: Dooro luqaddaada
strings.language.subtitle: Dooro luqadda lagu muujinayo safka koowaad. Ingiriisiga had iyo jeer hoosta ayuu uga muuqdaa saf labaad.
strings.settings.languageMode.enOnly: Ingiriisi oo keliya (sida imtixaanka dhabta ah)
strings.picker.noResults: Wax lama helin. Isku day raadin kale.
strings.state.title: Dooro gobolkaaga
strings.state.subtitle: Gobol kastaa wuxuu leeyahay sharciyadiisa iyo su'aalihiisa imtixaan. Dooro gobolka aad imtixaanka ka qaadan doonto.
strings.pwa.installPrompt: Ku rakib abka si aad u barato adigoo offline ah
strings.pwa.iosInstallHint: iPhone: taabo Share, ka dibna 'Add to Home Screen'
strings.pwa.offlineReady: Diyaar u ah barasho offline ah!
